decisions.summary: UI/UX preparation cockpit is reviewable as one vertical slice
decisions.reason: Changed source files form one reviewer-coherent UI/UX preparation path: cli dispatch, uiux readiness/cockpit generation, design-ssot projection, and focused regression coverage. The split-plan recommends lanes, but requirements docs, runtime behavior, and design-ssot lineage are all for the same story acceptance path; separating design-ssot.json would hide the required lineage update rather than reduce review risk.
